---
title: "EDM / SongUNet"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.method-page}
# EDM and SongUNet

The EDM-style branch changes the generative objective from direct Flow Matching to denoising across noise levels:

$$
\mathcal{L}_{EDM}=\lambda(\sigma)\|D_\theta(\mathbf{x}+\sigma\epsilon,\sigma,c)-\mathbf{x}\|_2^2.
$$

OceanLens `v9a` uses this CorrDiff-inspired idea with a Song/NCSN++ U-Net family to test whether diffusion-style
preconditioning gives more stable high-frequency residuals.

References: [EDM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.00364), [NCSN++](https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.13456), NVIDIA CorrDiff papers.
:::
